title: Getting Found in AI Search Results | Liftwright
meta_description: When buyers ask an assistant to recommend a business like yours, will it name you? A clear look at earning visibility in AI answers without chasing vanity metrics.

schema.headline: How to get your business recommended in AI search answers
schema.description: When buyers ask an assistant to recommend a business like yours, will it name you? A clear look at earning visibility in AI answers without chasing vanity metrics.

mainEntity.name: How do I make sure AI assistants recommend my business when buyers ask?

acceptedAnswer.text: An assistant recommends the businesses it can read clearly. That means publishing plain, structured, authoritative answers to the exact questions a buyer asks before a considered purchase, so the model can find you, understand what you do, and cite you. It is the same authority that wins ordinary search, applied to a new front door. It is a real capability and one layer of demand, not a standalone channel or a magic switch.
